I have two tasks I want you to accomplish. The first is a data one. we have this @apps/wodsmith-start/src/components/registration/affiliate-combobox.tsx @apps/wodsmith-start/src/server-fns/affiliate-fns.ts#L48-70  that searches for affiliates but right now it only displays 'verified' affiliates. we want to open search up to any affiliates others have answered that aren't just verified so that if someone entered their gym, others can select that option after searching so we don't have a crazy number of slightly different strings that point to the same affiliate

content.text: Let me check where the verified filter is applied.

content.text:
Now I see the picture. The affiliate name is stored as a string on the user profile (`user.affiliateName`) and in registration metadata, but it's **not being inserted into the `affiliates` table** when athletes enter a custom gym name. The affiliates table only has 2 manually verified entries.

The fix has two parts:
1. When an athlete registers with a custom affiliate name, upsert it into the `affiliates` table as "unverified"
2. The search already returns all statuses, so that part works

Let me check the registration flow where affiliates get saved.

Pushed. All three review comments addressed:

1. **Stale responses** — added `searchCounterRef` that increments on every query change and popover close; responses from outdated requests are ignored
2. **Input normalization** — both upsert sites now trim whitespace and do case-insensitive `"independent"` check
